parameters.text: =👋 Hi {{ $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message.from.first_name }}! Please share your 📍 location to mark attendance.

=📍 Location received!

Now please take a live photo 📸 and send it as a *file/document* (not as a photo).

📱 How to send as file:
• Android: tap 📎 → File → select your photo
• iPhone: tap 📎 → File → browse photos

⚠️ Must be sent within 2 minutes.

parameters.queryString: name = "Techno Attendance" and mimeType = "application/vnd.google-apps.folder" and trashed = false

={{ `name = "${new Date($('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message.date * 1000).toISOString().slice(0,10)}" and mimeType = "application/vnd.google-apps.folder" and trashed = false and "${$('Parent Folder Exists?').item.json.id ?? $('Create Parent Folder').item.json.id}" in parents` }}

parameters.text:
={{ '✅ Attendance marked successfully!

👤 Name: ' + $('Lookup Pending Checkin').item.json.name + '
🕐 Time: ' + new Date().toLocaleString('en-IN', {timeZone: 'Asia/Kolkata'}) + '
📍 Location logged!
📸 Photo uploaded!' + ($('Parse EXIF').item.json.exifGpsLat ? '
🛰️ GPS verified from photo!' : '') + '

Have a great day! 🎉' }}

={{ '⏱️ Photo rejected!

' + ($('Log Timestamps').item.json.exifTs !== null ? 'EXIF timestamp shows the photo was not taken within 2 minutes of your location share.' : 'Photo was sent more than 2 minutes after your location share.') + '

🔍 Debug info:
• Location time: ' + new Date($('Log Timestamps').item.json.locationTs * 1000).toLocaleString('en-IN', {timeZone: 'Asia/Kolkata'}) + '
• Photo time: ' + new Date(($('Log Timestamps').item.json.exifTs ?? $('Log Timestamps').item.json.messageDate) * 1000).toLocaleString('en-IN', {timeZone: 'Asia/Kolkata'}) + '
• Gap: ' + $('Log Timestamps').item.json.diff + ' seconds

Please send /checkin to start again.' }}

❌ I didn't understand that.

Please send /checkin to mark your attendance.
